revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[de:Dekanlisten C]]
In Egyptology, the '''Decanal Lists C''' refer to {{ill|Star clock|ja|古代エジプトの星時計|de|Altägyptische Sternuhren|Star clock=Star clock|lt=Ancient Egyptian Star Clocks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Star clock|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} along with {{ill|Planet|en|Planet|qid=Q634|lt=Planet|1=Planet}} mentions, as well as decanal lists that were first attested in {{ill|TT353|ja|TT353|lt=Tomb of Senenmut|lt_ja=セネンムトの墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TT353|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and based on the data of {{ill|Decanal Lists A2|ja|デカンリストA2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Decanal Lists A2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The Decanal Lists C are also attested, among other places, in {{ill|KV35|en|KV35|qid=Q1633253|lt=Second Tomb of Amenophis III|1=KV35}}, {{ill|TT33 (tomb)|en|TT33 (tomb)|qid=Q2385399|lt=Tomb of Pedamenope|1=TT33 (tomb)}}, {{ill|TT223|ja|TT223|de|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TT223|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and in {{ill|TT34|ja|TT34|lt=Tomb of Montemhet|lt_ja=モンテムヘトの墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TT34|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == See also == * {{ill|Diagonal star clock EA47605|ja|斜星時計 EA47605|de|Diagonalsternuhr EA47605|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diagonal star clock EA47605|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|List of Theban Tombs|ja|テーベの墓の一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Theban Tombs|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == Literature == * {{ill|Jochem Kahl|ja|ヨッヘム・カール|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jochem Kahl|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Siut-Thebes: On the Appreciation of Traditions in Ancient Egypt''. Brill, Leiden 1999, ISBN 9-0041-1441-6 ==References==
{{translated page|de|Dekanlisten C|version=217852968|comment=Imported full de history}}
[[de:Dekanlisten C]] [[ja:デカンリストC]] <!--dewiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
